composition_vocabulary: Tiles alternate between tight product close-ups centred on a single object and flat-lay packaging shots with deliberate negative space; graphic tiles break the rhythm with bold edge-to-edge type. Overall: object-forward, merchandise-coded, minimal staging.
lighting_quality: Predominantly flat or softbox studio light; a few tiles use harsh high-contrast light that reads closer to editorial; natural light is rare.
material_textures: polished silver, matte aluminium, printed paper, skin, enamel, raw stone
aesthetic_register: The sample sits between contemporary art-school drop culture and talisman/charm energy — more downtown-label product release than classical luxury heirloom.
notably_absent: There is almost no soft or warm lighting, no fine-chain or precious-stone close-up photography, and none of the velvet/silk presentation tropes typical of a traditional luxury jewellery moodboard.
